## Summary

Write a focused **operator guide for the governance dashboard** — what each seam shows, how to read somatic health, and when to escalate.

## Scope (bite-sized)

New or extended doc under `docs/operators/` (suggested title: `GOVERNANCE_DASHBOARD_OPERATOR_GUIDE.md`):

- Surfaces: `/operator`, somatic health payloads, civilizational posture fields
- Cross-links: `docs/operators/AAIS_OPERATOR_GUIDE.md`, `docs/operations/FIRST_TIME_OPERATOR_GUIDE.md`
- README link from **How to join in 10 minutes**

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] 30-minute readable guide with URLs, screenshots optional
- [ ] Lists verification commands operators can run after deploy
- [ ] Linked from `docs/community/HELP_WANTED_HUB.md` and README

## Labels

`good first issue`, `help wanted`, `documentation`, `governance`
